## Impact Assessment

### Security

Describe security impact, new controls, changed controls, and risks.

### Data and Privacy

Describe schema, classification, retention, migration, and privacy impact.

### Performance and Scalability

### Compatibility

## Validation

- [ ] Content follows normative language rules.
- [ ] Rule IDs are unique and stable.
- [ ] No conflicting or duplicated requirements were introduced.
- [ ] Links and references were checked.
- [ ] Examples do not contain real secrets or sensitive information.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` was updated when applicable.
- [ ] AI agent instructions were followed.

## Exceptions

List approved exceptions, or state `None`.
